penalties.description: Task incomplete - only outbound transfers completed, return transfers not performed within the video timeframe.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on completion time of 147 seconds. Major disagreement on task completion status: Claude identified incomplete task (no return transfers), while GPT-4o claimed return transfers occurred but with one lost object. Given that Claude's phases_detected only shows outbound transfers and the FLS rubric requires complete bidirectional transfer, the incomplete_task penalty takes precedence over lost_object penalty, resulting in zero score.

claude_value.description: Task incomplete - only outbound transfers completed, return transfers not performed within the video timeframe.

gpt_value.description: One object was dropped outside the field of view and was unretrievable.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's phase detection shows only outbound transfers, which aligns with incomplete task assessment. FLS rubric requires complete bidirectional transfer; incomplete task penalty (zero score) supersedes lost object penalty.
Claude's phase detection is consistent with incomplete task penalty and provides more detailed breakdown including setup phase.
Incomplete task penalty results in automatic zero score per FLS rubric, regardless of time performance or other penalties.
